center.name: 阿凱塔賈維-洛洛巴塔國家公園
center.summary: 阿凱塔賈維-洛洛巴塔國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Moluccan goshawk，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It was reported that they could be found in secondary forests but during a survey of Aketajawe Lolobata National Park, all sightings were from primary forests.Bashari, H
